x-enumeration-literals.name: Reservation Booking Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Reserves funds for a transaction 

Comment:
(e.g., card authorization).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Provisional Booking Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Temporarily books an entry until final confirmation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Booking Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Books loan disbursements, repayments, or schedules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Registration Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Captures and registers financial events such as payments, deposits, withdrawals, or loan disbursements.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commitment Recording Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Records financial commitments or agreements such as loan approvals, credit utilization, or investment allocations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Validation and Control Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures that booking follows predefined rules, limits, and product conditions before the transaction is confirmed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Traceability and Audit Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maintains a record of all bookings to support monitoring, reconciliation, and compliance.
